entry_lab_recovered.title: Entry Laboratory
entry_lab_recovered.text: The first floor is usable again. The tower responds to simple brews, but much of it remains asleep.

archive_revelation.title: Archive Revelation
archive_revelation.text: The archive timeline resolves: the wizard sealed each floor not to hoard power, but to keep the tower from consuming every living system bound into it. Leaving was the final act of restraint.

greenhouse_expanded.title: Greenhouse Expanded
greenhouse_expanded.text: Brin reset the old planter wards. A new moon bed is active on the north side of the greenhouse.

containment_stable.title: Habitats Stabilized
containment_stable.text: Lyra tuned the habitat wards. Gentle collection from tower creatures can now support regular alchemical work.

statuses.archive_timeline_complete: The archive timeline snaps into place.
statuses.archive_timeline_incomplete: The archive still has missing pieces.
statuses.archive_reconstruction_ready: Ready: final timeline can be reconstructed.
statuses.archive_reconstruction_missing: Final timeline still has missing pieces.
statuses.greenhouse_unlock: The tower greenhouse unlocks upstairs after your tenth brew.

overlays.observatory_epilogue: The restored tower resolves its own history through the lens above the clouds. The wizard did not vanish in failure. They chose distance over domination, leaving a machine of rooms that only remains safe when used with restraint. The tower is not yours to conquer. It is yours to tend.
overlays.observatory_footer: Enter or Esc to step back
